query: SELECT a.id, a.name, a.tipoMentoria, a.contratoInicio, a.contratoFim, ca.periodoInicio, ca.periodoTermino, ca.totalSessoesContratadas FROM alunos a LEFT JOIN contratos_aluno ca ON ca.alunoId = a.id AND ca.isActive = 1 WHERE a.name LIKE '%Julia%' OR a.name LIKE '%Júlia%' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT a.id, a.name, a.tipoMentoria, a.contratoInicio, a.contratoFim, ca.periodoInicio, ca.periodoTermino, ca.totalSessoesContratadas FROM alunos a LEFT JOIN contratos_aluno ca ON ca.alunoId = a.id AND ca.isActive = 1 WHERE a.name LIKE '%Julia%' OR a.name LIKE '%Júlia%' LIMIT 5;
